topic: Security incident detection, investigation, and response
description: End-to-end security incident response: alert detection via log/sensor monitoring, investigation through system analysis, approval-gated response execution, and post-incident reporting.

steps_hint: Detect alert from log-watcher or monitoring dashboard
Investigate by collecting logs, system state, and affected scope
Classify severity and determine response actions
use_cases: セキュリティアラート対応
インシデントレポート生成
hints._comment: Pattern C: investigation is automated, but response actions (credential revocation, system isolation) require human approval via approval-gate.
